---
title: "Welcome to My New Website"
description: "After years with a basic GitHub Pages site, I've rebuilt yatawara.com from the ground up using Quarto."
date: "2026-04-05"
categories: [meta, quarto]
draft: true
---

Welcome! I've rebuilt my personal website using [Quarto](https://quarto.org), a scientific publishing system that lets me write in Markdown, embed R and Python code, and deploy to GitHub Pages — all from one workflow.

I'll be posting here about my research in financial econometrics, tutorials on statistical methods, and reflections on teaching statistics with AI tools. Stay tuned.
